prompt: {"type":"anime character reference collage","subject":{"gender_presentation":"young woman","age_appearance":"early 20s","vibe":"playful, confident, slightly mischievous, casual streetwear","ethnicity":"anime-stylized ambiguous East Asian","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"original character\"}","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"vivid cyan blue\"}","style":"messy chin-length bob with heavy layered volume, long side-swept bangs covering one eye, loose flyaway strands"},"eyes":{"color":"golden amber","shape":"sharp, expressive anime eyes"},"accessories":["small hoop earrings","thin necklace"],"outfit":{"top":"white camisole tank top with thin straps","outerwear":"oversized black puffer jacket worn loose and off the shoulders","bottom":"{argument name=\"bottom garment\" default=\"blue denim shorts\"}","footwear":"barefoot in the full-body view"},"prop":"{argument name=\"handheld prop\" default=\"compact silver camera\"}"},"style":{"medium":"loose high-end anime illustration, sketchy concept-art presentation","rendering":"clean linework with painterly shading, rich but soft cel-paint feel, visible brush texture, white background","color_palette":"cool blue hair against black jacket, white top, denim blue shorts, warm amber eyes","composition":"asymmetrical collage with overlapping portraits and figure studies"},"layout":{"background":"plain white","sections":[{"title":"left main portrait","position":"left","count":1,"labels":["large bust-up three-quarter portrait holding camera"]},{"title":"top center head studies","position":"upper middle","count":3,"labels":["side head portrait","smiling head portrait with eyes closed","serious head portrait looking right"]},{"title":"right figure study","position":"right","count":1,"labels":["mid-shot seated or leaning pose holding camera"]},{"title":"center full-body","position":"middle","count":1,"labels":["standing full-body pose with bare feet"]},{"title":"bottom center head study","position":"lower middle","count":1,"labels":["downward-angled head portrait"]}],"total_visible_character_drawings":7},"camera_framing":"mixed framing: 3 head studies, 1 large bust portrait, 1 mid-shot, 1 full-body standing pose, 1 additional head study","prompt":"Create a clean white-background anime character design collage featuring 7 drawings of the same young woman. She has {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"vivid cyan blue\"} messy bob hair, golden amber eyes, and a cool, flirtatious attitude. Include 1 large left-side bust portrait holding a {argument name=\"handheld prop\" default=\"compact silver camera\"}, 3 small upper head studies with varied expressions and angles, 1 center full-body standing pose, 1 right-side mid-shot holding the camera, and 1 lower head study. Dress her in a white camisole tank top, oversized black puffer jacket slipping off the shoulders, and {argument name=\"bottom garment\" default=\"blue denim shorts\"}. Add hoop earrings and a delicate necklace. Use dynamic windswept hair strands, sketchy elegant linework, soft painterly shading, and a polished anime concept sheet aesthetic."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"anime character reference collage","subject":{"gender_presentation":"年轻女性","age_appearance":"20 岁出头","vibe":"俏皮、自信、略带调皮、休闲街头风","ethnicity":"动漫风格的东亚形象","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"原创角色\"}","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"鲜艳的青蓝色\"}","style":"凌乱的下巴长度波波头，具有厚重的层次感，长长的侧分刘海遮住一只眼睛，有松散的碎发"},"eyes":{"color":"金琥珀色","shape":"锐利且富有表现力的动漫眼睛"},"accessories":["小圆环耳环","细项链"],"outfit":{"top":"白色吊带背心","outerwear":"超大款黑色羽绒服，松垮地穿在肩上","bottom":"{argument name=\"bottom garment\" default=\"蓝色牛仔短裤\"}","footwear":"全身图中赤脚"},"prop":"{argument name=\"handheld prop\" default=\"小型银色相机\"}"},"style":{"medium":"随性的高端动漫插画，草图风格的概念艺术展示","rendering":"干净的线条配合绘画感阴影，丰富而柔和的赛璐珞质感，可见笔触，白色背景","color_palette":"黑色外套衬托冷蓝色头发，白色上衣，牛仔蓝短裤，温暖的琥珀色眼睛","composition":"不对称拼贴，包含重叠的肖像和人物研究"},"layout":{"background":"纯白色","sections":[{"title":"左侧主肖像","position":"左侧","count":1,"labels":["大型半身像，四分之三侧面，手持相机"]},{"title":"顶部中心头部研究","position":"上中部","count":3,"labels":["侧面头部肖像","闭眼微笑头部肖像","看向右侧的严肃头部肖像"]},{"title":"右侧人物研究","position":"右侧","count":1,"labels":["中景坐姿或倚靠姿势，手持相机"]},{"title":"中心全身","position":"中部","count":1,"labels":["站立全身姿势，赤脚"]},{"title":"底部中心头部研究","position":"下中部","count":1,"labels":["俯视角度的头部肖像"]}],"total_visible_character_drawings":7},"camera_framing":"混合构图：3 个头部研究，1 个大型半身像，1 个中景，1 个全身站立姿势，1 个额外头部研究","prompt":"创建一个干净的白底动漫角色设计拼贴图，包含 7 幅同一位年轻女性的绘图。她拥有 {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"鲜艳的青蓝色\"} 凌乱波波头、金琥珀色眼睛，以及冷酷、俏皮的气质。包括 1 幅左侧大型半身像（手持 {argument name=\"handheld prop\" default=\"小型银色相机\"}）、3 幅顶部小型头部研究（表情和角度各异）、1 幅中心全身站立姿势、1 幅右侧中景（手持相机）以及 1 幅底部头部研究。让她穿上白色吊带背心、滑落肩头的超大款黑色羽绒服，以及 {argument name=\"bottom garment\" default=\"蓝色牛仔短裤\"}。添加圆环耳环和精致的项链。使用动态的凌乱发丝、草图风格的优雅线条、柔和的绘画感阴影，以及精致的动漫设定集美学。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 蓝发动漫角色设定集：此提示词可生成一张带有多个肖像和姿势的白底动漫角色拼贴图，适用于概念艺术、风格探索或分镜角色设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: symmetrical, full-body, layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
